title: CoastWatch West Coast node / SWFSC ERDDAP migration
text:
Preface
This is a Quarto book.
To learn more about Quarto books visit https://quarto.org/docs/books.

title: 1  VIIRS Net Primary Productivity Cloud Run Workflow
text:
1.1 Purpose
This chapter documents a cloud-based workflow for generating VIIRS net primary productivity products.
This workflow computes daily and monthly satellite-derived primary productivity products from VIIRS inputs using a containerized Cloud Run Job pattern.
crumbs: 1  VIIRS Net Primary Productivity Cloud Run Workflow
